arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

arguments.name: --capture
arguments.description: Capture mode: write packets to a pcap file.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with nickthecook/gattacker (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with younggod16/Metasploitable2-vsftpd-2.3.4-FTP-Backdoor-Exploit (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with vanhoefm/fragattacks (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web', 'ble_4_x'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web', 'ble_4_x'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web', 'ble_4_x'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, ble_4_x] in the ble category. Fits when the engagement needs: A Node.js package for BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) Man-in-the-Middle & more.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: A Node.js package for BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) Man-in-the-Middle & more.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: npm install gattacker. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `DEBUG=ws-slave sudo node ws-slave`. Further invocations from upstream: `node scan <peripheral>`; `$KFIOSA_TARGET_URL`. A Node.js package for BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) Man-in-the-Middle & more.
